name: Stone
description: A fist-sized stone, good for nothing but throwing.

texts.critical_hit: Your stone cracks the {0} square in the skull!
texts.missed_hit: Your stone clatters off the floor past the {0}.

name: Dart
description: A small weighted dart, cheap and common.

texts.critical_hit: Your dart sinks deep into the {0}!

name: Boomerang
description: A curved throwing weapon that loops back to the hand. Rarely lost.

texts.critical_hit: Your boomerang cracks the {0} and spins back to your hand!
texts.hit: Your boomerang strikes the {0} and arcs back.
texts.missed_hit: Your boomerang loops past the {0} and returns empty.

name: Javelin
description: A long-shafted throwing spear, heavy enough to punch through armour.

texts.critical_hit: Your javelin runs the {0} clean through!
texts.missed_hit: Your javelin thuds into the ground past the {0}.

name: Large Rock
description: A boulder-sized rock, brutal to throw and brutal to be hit by.

texts.missed_hit: Your rock crashes to the ground past the {0}.
